utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check each for full specification: The requirement for each item is the category with 'costs'. The plan provides: - health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance separated into policies with monthly_costs and a total_cost; it explicitly includes mental health and physical coverage with costs. Fully specified. - property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs is provided through policies and total_cost. Fully specified. - travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs provided with policies and total_cost. Fully specified. - additional_services: enhancement services with costs provided with a service and total_cost. Fully specified. - total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown—plan provides monthly_premium but not annual breakdown; however, the item requires a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Since annual cost is missing, this item is not fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.
